choices.text: ADS-B (GPS broadcast, replacing radar) + PBN (Performance-Based Navigation via GPS waypoints) + Data Comm (text-based ATC) + SWIM (system data sharing) + OPDs (continuous descents). $35-40B multi-decade FAA modernization program.

UTM (Unmanned Aircraft Traffic Management): separate low-altitude system <400 ft; Remote ID broadcast (2024+); BVLOS (Beyond Visual Line Of Sight) operations emerging via Part 135 certifications. Separate from manned aviation.

questions.explanation: UTM for drones; separate from manned.
